title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with GPU acceleration.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: Python/JS framework that ships first-party Ollama integration for building LLM apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for interacting with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for chatting with Ollama models (now renamed open-webui).

title: Litellm
summary: Universal LLM proxy that supports Ollama endpoints alongside OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.

title: chainlit
summary: Python package to build conversational UIs with built-in Ollama support.

title: haystack-ollama
summary: Deepset Haystack integration allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with reactive streams support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama with additional model management helpers.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that uses local Ollama models instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama with Socket-mode support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images for CPU and GPU (CUDA/ROCm) usage.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python example showing RAG with Ollama, ChromaDB and LangChain.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Active GitHub discussion tracking native NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) performance tweaks.

title: ollama-mac-mps
summary: Issue thread documenting Metal Performance Shaders optimizations on Apple Silicon.

title: ollama-models-registry
summary: Official catalog of 100+ supported models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.).
